Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition For Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John Fleer, esq. (925-930-9518) for Petitioner.
Joshua M. Templet, esq. (415-510-3533) of Dept of Justice Office of the Attorney General for Respondent.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER HAFI MUHANNAD's Petition For Administrative Writ is denied. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
